verses.latin_vulgate: Anno vigesimo septimo Jeroboam regis Israël, regnavit Azarias filius Amasiæ regis Juda.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בִּשְׁנַ֨ת עֶשְׂרִ֤ים וָשֶׁ֙בַע֙ שָׁנָ֔ה לְיָרׇבְעָ֖ם מֶ֣לֶךְ יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל מָלַ֛ךְ עֲזַרְיָ֥ה בֶן־אֲמַצְיָ֖ה מֶ֥לֶךְ יְהוּדָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: In the seven and twentieth year of Jeroboam, king of Israel, reigned Azarias, son of Amasias, king of Juda.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jerobeamin Israelin kuninkaan seitsemäntenä vuonna kolmattakymmentä tuli Asaria Amatsian Juudan kuninkaan poika kuninkaaksi.
verses.king_james: In the twenty and seventh year of Jeroboam king of Israel began Azariah son of Amaziah king of Judah to reign.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sedecim annorum erat cum regnare cœpisset, et quinquaginta duobus annis regnavit in Jerusalem : nomen matris ejus Jechelia de Jerusalem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֶּן־שֵׁ֨שׁ עֶשְׂרֵ֤ה שָׁנָה֙ הָיָ֣ה בְמׇלְכ֔וֹ וַחֲמִשִּׁ֤ים וּשְׁתַּ֙יִם֙ שָׁנָ֔ה מָלַ֖ךְ בִּירוּשָׁלָ֑͏ִם וְשֵׁ֣ם אִמּ֔וֹ יְכׇלְיָ֖הוּ מִירוּשָׁלָֽ͏ִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: He was sixteen years old when he began to reign, and he reigned two and fifty years in Jerusalem: the name of his mother was Jechelia, of Jerusalem.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuudentoistakymmenen ajastaikainen oli hän tullessaan kuninkaaksi, ja hän hallitsi kaksi vuotta kuudettakymmentä Jerusalemissa; hänen äitinsä kutsuttiin Jekolja Jerusalemista.
verses.king_james: Sixteen years old was he when he began to reign, and he reigned two and fifty years in Jerusalem. And his mother’s name was Jecholiah of Jerusalem.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fecitque quod erat placitum coram Domino, juxta omnia quæ fecit Amasias pater ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֥עַשׂ הַיָּשָׁ֖ר בְּעֵינֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֑ה כְּכֹ֥ל אֲשֶׁר־עָשָׂ֖ה אֲמַצְיָ֥הוּ אָבִֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he did that which was pleasing before the Lord, according to all that his father, Amasias, had done.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän teki mitä Herralle hyvästi kelpasi, kaiketi niinkuin hänen isänsä Amatsia tehnyt oli,
verses.king_james: And he did that which was right in the sight of the Lord, according to all that his father Amaziah had done;

verses.latin_vulgate: Verumtamen excelsa non est demolitus : adhuc populus sacrificabat, et adolebat incensum in excelsis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רַ֥ק הַבָּמ֖וֹת לֹא־סָ֑רוּ ע֥וֹד הָעָ֛ם מְזַבְּחִ֥ים וּֽמְקַטְּרִ֖ים בַּבָּמֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: But the high places he did not destroy, for the people sacrificed, and burnt incense in the high places.
verses.finnish_biblia: Paitsi sitä ettei he luopuneet korkeuksista; sillä kansa uhrasi ja suitsutti vielä korkeuksilla.
verses.king_james: Save that the high places were not removed: the people sacrificed and burnt incense still on the high places.

verses.latin_vulgate: Percussit autem Dominus regem, et fuit leprosus usque in diem mortis suæ, et habitabat in domo libera seorsum : Joatham vero filius regis gubernabat palatium, et judicabit populum terræ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְנַגַּ֨ע יְהֹוָ֜ה אֶת־הַמֶּ֗לֶךְ וַיְהִ֤י מְצֹרָע֙ עַד־י֣וֹם מֹת֔וֹ וַיֵּ֖שֶׁב בְּבֵ֣ית הַחׇפְשִׁ֑ית וְיוֹתָ֤ם בֶּן־הַמֶּ֙לֶךְ֙ עַל־הַבַּ֔יִת שֹׁפֵ֖ט אֶת־עַ֥ם הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord struck the king, so that he was a leper unto the day of his death, and he dwelt in a free house apart: but Joatham, the king's son, governed the palace, and judged the people of the land.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra vaivasi kuningasta, niin että hän oli spitalissa kuolemapäiväänsä asti, ja asui erinäisessä huoneessa. Mutta Jotam kuninkaan poika hallitsi huoneen ja tuomitsi kansaa maalla.
verses.king_james: And the Lord smote the king, so that he was a leper unto the day of his death, and dwelt in a several house. And Jotham the king’s son was over the house, judging the people of the land.

verses.latin_vulgate: Reliqua autem sermonum Azariæ, et universa quæ fecit, nonne hæc scripta sunt in libro verborum dierum regum Juda ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיֶ֛תֶר דִּבְרֵ֥י עֲזַרְיָ֖הוּ וְכׇל־אֲשֶׁ֣ר עָשָׂ֑ה הֲלֹא־הֵ֣ם כְּתוּבִ֗ים עַל־סֵ֛פֶר דִּבְרֵ֥י הַיָּמִ֖ים לְמַלְכֵ֥י יְהוּדָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the rest of the acts of Azarias, and all that he did, are they not written in the book of the words of the days of the kings of Juda?
verses.finnish_biblia: Mitä enempi Asariasta sanomista on, ja kaikista, mitä hän tehnyt on: eikö se ole kirjoitettu Juudan kuningasten aikakirjassa?
verses.king_james: And the rest of the acts of Azariah, and all that he did, are they not written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Judah?

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dormivit Azarias cum patribus suis : sepelieruntque eum cum majoribus suis in civitate David, et regnavit Joatham filius ejus pro eo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁכַּ֤ב עֲזַרְיָה֙ עִם־אֲבֹתָ֔יו וַיִּקְבְּר֥וּ אֹת֛וֹ עִם־אֲבֹתָ֖יו בְּעִ֣יר דָּוִ֑ד וַיִּמְלֹ֛ךְ יוֹתָ֥ם בְּנ֖וֹ תַּחְתָּֽיו׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And Azarias slept with his fathers: and they buried him with his ancestors in the city of David, and Joatham, his son, reigned in his stead.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Asaria nukkui isäinsä kanssa ja haudattiin isäinsä tykö Davidin kaupunkiin; ja hänen poikansa Jotam tuli kuninkaaksi hänen siaansa.
verses.king_james: So Azariah slept with his fathers; and they buried him with his fathers in the city of David: and Jotham his son reigned in his stead.

verses.latin_vulgate: Anno trigesimo octavo Azariæ regis Juda, regnavit Zacharias filius Jeroboam super Israël in Samaria sex mensibus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בִּשְׁנַ֨ת שְׁלֹשִׁ֤ים וּשְׁמֹנֶה֙ שָׁנָ֔ה לַעֲזַרְיָ֖הוּ מֶ֣לֶךְ יְהוּדָ֑ה מָ֠לַ֠ךְ זְכַרְיָ֨הוּ בֶן־יָרׇבְעָ֧ם עַל־יִשְׂרָאֵ֛ל בְּשֹׁמְר֖וֹן שִׁשָּׁ֥ה חֳדָשִֽׁים׃
verses.douay_rheims: In the eight and thirtieth year of Azarias, king of Juda, reigned Zacharias, son of Jeroboam, over Israel, in Samaria, six months:
verses.finnish_biblia: Asarian Juudan kuninkaan kahdeksantena vuonna neljättäkymmentä oli Sakaria Jerobeamin poika Israelin kuningas kuusi kuukautta Samariassa,
verses.king_james: In the thirty and eighth year of Azariah king of Judah did Zachariah the son of Jeroboam reign over Israel in Samaria six months.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et fecit quod malum est coram Domino, sicut fecerant patres ejus : non recessit a peccatis Jeroboam filii Nabat, qui peccare fecit Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֤עַשׂ הָרַע֙ בְּעֵינֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֔ה כַּאֲשֶׁ֥ר עָשׂ֖וּ אֲבֹתָ֑יו לֹ֣א סָ֗ר מֵֽחַטֹּאות֙ יָרׇבְעָ֣ם בֶּן־נְבָ֔ט אֲשֶׁ֥ר הֶחֱטִ֖יא אֶת־יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he did that which is evil before the Lord, as his fathers had done: he departed not from the sins of Jeroboam the son of Nabat, who made Israel to sin.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän teki pahaa Herran edessä, niinkuin hänen isänsäkin tehneet olivat, ja ei luopunut Jerobeamin Nebatin pojan synneistä, joka Israelin saatti syntiä tekemään.
verses.king_james: And he did that which was evil in the sight of the Lord, as his fathers had done: he departed not from the sins of Jeroboam the son of Nebat, who made Israel to sin.

verses.latin_vulgate: Conjuravit autem contra eum Sellum filius Jabes : percussitque eum palam, et interfecit, regnavitque pro eo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקְשֹׁ֤ר עָלָיו֙ שַׁלֻּ֣ם בֶּן־יָבֵ֔שׁ וַיַּכֵּ֥הוּ קׇֽבׇל־עָ֖ם וַיְמִיתֵ֑הוּ וַיִּמְלֹ֖ךְ תַּחְתָּֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Sellum, the son of Jabes, conspired against him: and struck him publicly, and killed him, and reigned in his place.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Sallum Jabeksen poika teki liiton häntä vastaan, ja löi hänen kansan edessä, ja tappoi hänen, ja tuli kuninkaaksi hänen siaansa.
verses.king_james: And Shallum the son of Jabesh conspired against him, and smote him before the people, and slew him, and reigned in his stead.

verses.latin_vulgate: Reliqua autem verborum Zachariæ, nonne hæc scripta sunt in libro sermonum dierum regum Israël ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיֶ֖תֶר דִּבְרֵ֣י זְכַרְיָ֑ה הִנָּ֣ם כְּתוּבִ֗ים עַל־סֵ֛פֶר דִּבְרֵ֥י הַיָּמִ֖ים לְמַלְכֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: Now the rest of the acts of Zacharias, are they not written in the book of the words of the days of the kings of Israel?
verses.finnish_biblia: Mitä enempi Sakariasta sanomista on: katso, se on kirjoitettu Israelin kuningasten aikakirjassa.
verses.king_james: And the rest of the acts of Zachariah, behold, they are written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Iste est sermo Domini quem locutus est ad Jehu, dicens : Filii tui usque ad quartam generationem sedebunt super thronum Israël. Factumque est ita.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ה֣וּא דְבַר־יְהֹוָ֗ה אֲשֶׁ֨ר דִּבֶּ֤ר אֶל־יֵהוּא֙ לֵאמֹ֔ר בְּנֵ֣י רְבִיעִ֔ים יֵשְׁב֥וּ לְךָ֖ עַל־כִּסֵּ֣א יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וַֽיְהִי־כֵֽן׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: This was the word of the Lord, which he spoke to Jehu, saying: Thy children, to the fourth generation, shall sit upon the throne of Israel. And so it came to pass.
verses.finnish_biblia: Tämä on Herran sana, jonka hän Jehulle puhunut oli, sanoen: sinun poikas pitää istuman Israelin istuimella neljänteen polveen asti; ja se tapahtui niin.
verses.king_james: This was the word of the Lord which he spake unto Jehu, saying, Thy sons shall sit on the throne of Israel unto the fourth generation. And so it came to pass.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sellum filius Jabes regnavit trigesimo novo anno Azariæ regis Juda : regnavit autem uno mense in Samaria.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שַׁלּ֤וּם בֶּן־יָבֵישׁ֙ מָלַ֔ךְ בִּשְׁנַ֨ת שְׁלֹשִׁ֤ים וָתֵ֙שַׁע֙ שָׁנָ֔ה לְעֻזִּיָּ֖ה מֶ֣לֶךְ יְהוּדָ֑ה וַיִּמְלֹ֥ךְ יֶֽרַח־יָמִ֖ים בְּשֹׁמְרֽוֹן׃
verses.douay_rheims: Sellum, the son of Jabes, began to reign in the nine and thirtieth year of Azarias, king of Juda: and reigned one month in Samaria.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ussian Juudan kuinkaan yhdeksäntenä vuonna neljättäkymmentä tuli Sallum Jabeksen poika kuninkaaksi, ja hallitsi kuukauden Samariassa.
verses.king_james: Shallum the son of Jabesh began to reign in the nine and thirtieth year of Uzziah king of Judah; and he reigned a full month in Samaria.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ascendit Manahem filius Gadi de Thersa, venitque in Samariam, et percussit Sellum filium Jabes in Samaria, et interfecit eum : regnavitque pro eo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֩עַל֩ מְנַחֵ֨ם בֶּן־גָּדִ֜י מִתִּרְצָ֗ה וַיָּבֹא֙ שֹׁמְר֔וֹן וַיַּ֛ךְ אֶת־שַׁלּ֥וּם בֶּן־יָבֵ֖ישׁ בְּשֹׁמְר֑וֹן וַיְמִיתֵ֖הוּ וַיִּמְלֹ֥ךְ תַּחְתָּֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Manahem, the son of Gadi, went up from Thersa, and he came into Samaria, and struck Sellum, the son of Jabes, in Samaria, and slew him, and reigned in his stead.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä Menahem Gadin poika meni ylös Tirsasta ja tuli Samariaan, ja löi Sallumin Jabeksen pojan Samariassa, tappoi hänen ja tuli kuninkaaksi hänen siaansa.
verses.king_james: For Menahem the son of Gadi went up from Tirzah, and came to Samaria, and smote Shallum the son of Jabesh in Samaria, and slew him, and reigned in his stead.

verses.latin_vulgate: Reliqua autem verborum Sellum, et conjuratio ejus, per quam tetendit insidias, nonne hæc scripta sunt in libro sermonum dierum regum Israël ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיֶ֙תֶר֙ דִּבְרֵ֣י שַׁלּ֔וּם וְקִשְׁר֖וֹ אֲשֶׁ֣ר קָשָׁ֑ר הִנָּ֣ם כְּתוּבִ֗ים עַל־סֵ֛פֶר דִּבְרֵ֥י הַיָּמִ֖ים לְמַלְכֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the rest of the acts of Sellum, and his conspiracy which he made, are they not written in the book of the words of the days of the kings of Israel?
verses.finnish_biblia: Mitä enempi Sallumista sanomista on ja hänen liitostansa, jonka hän teki: katso, se on kirjoitettu Israelin kuningasten aikakirjassa.
verses.king_james: And the rest of the acts of Shallum, and his conspiracy which he made, behold, they are written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tunc percussit Manahem Thapsam, et omnes qui erant in ea, et terminos ejus de Thersa : noluerant enim aperire ei : et interfecit omnes prægnantes ejus, et scidit eas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָ֣ז יַכֶּֽה־מְ֠נַחֵ֠ם אֶת־תִּפְסַ֨ח וְאֶת־כׇּל־אֲשֶׁר־בָּ֤הּ וְאֶת־גְּבוּלֶ֙יהָ֙ מִתִּרְצָ֔ה כִּ֛י לֹ֥א פָתַ֖ח וַיַּ֑ךְ אֵ֛ת כׇּל־הֶהָ֥רוֹתֶ֖יהָ בִּקֵּֽעַ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Then Manahem destroyed Thapsa and all that were in it, and the borders thereof from Thersa, because they would not open to him: and he slew all the women thereof that were with child, and ripped them up.
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin löi Menahem Tipsan ja kaikki jotka siellä olivat, ja löi heidän rajansa Tirsasta, ettei he häntä tahtoneet päästää sisälle, ja kaikki heidän raskaat vaimonsa repäisi hän rikki.
verses.king_james: Then Menahem smote Tiphsah, and all that were therein, and the coasts thereof from Tirzah: because they opened not to him, therefore he smote it; and all the women therein that were with child he ripped up.

verses.latin_vulgate: Anno trigesimo nono Azariæ regis Juda, regnavit Manahem filius Gadi super Israël decem annis in Samaria.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בִּשְׁנַ֨ת שְׁלֹשִׁ֤ים וָתֵ֙שַׁע֙ שָׁנָ֔ה לַעֲזַרְיָ֖ה מֶ֣לֶךְ יְהוּדָ֑ה מָ֠לַ֠ךְ מְנַחֵ֨ם בֶּן־גָּדִ֧י עַל־יִשְׂרָאֵ֛ל עֶ֥שֶׂר שָׁנִ֖ים בְּשֹׁמְרֽוֹן׃
verses.douay_rheims: In the nine and thirtieth year of Azarias, king of Juda, reigned Manahem, son of Gadi, over Israel, ten years, in Samaria.
verses.finnish_biblia: Asarian Juudan kuninkaan yhdeksäntenä vuonna neljättäkymmentä tuli Menahem Gadin poika Israelin kuninkaaksi ja oli kymmenen vuotta Samariassa,
verses.king_james: In the nine and thirtieth year of Azariah king of Judah began Menahem the son of Gadi to reign over Israel, and reigned ten years in Samaria.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fecitque quod erat malum coram Domino : non recessit a peccatis Jeroboam filii Nabat, qui peccare fecit Israël, cunctis diebus ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֥עַשׂ הָרַ֖ע בְּעֵינֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֑ה לֹ֣א סָ֠ר מֵעַ֨ל חַטֹּ֜אות יָרׇבְעָ֧ם בֶּן־נְבָ֛ט אֲשֶׁר־הֶחֱטִ֥יא אֶת־יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל כׇּל־יָמָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he did that which was evil before the Lord: he departed not from the sins of Jeroboam, the son of Nabat, who made Israel to sin, all his days.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja teki pahaa Herran edessä, ja ei luopunut elinaikanansa Jerobeamin Nebatin pojan synneistä, joka Israelin saatti syntiä tekemään.
verses.king_james: And he did that which was evil in the sight of the Lord: he departed not all his days from the sins of Jeroboam the son of Nebat, who made Israel to sin.

verses.latin_vulgate: Veniebat Phul rex Assyriorum in terram, et dabat Manahem Phul mille talenta argenti, ut esset ei in auxilium, et firmaret regnum ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בָּ֣א פ֤וּל מֶֽלֶךְ־אַשּׁוּר֙ עַל־הָאָ֔רֶץ וַיִּתֵּ֤ן מְנַחֵם֙ לְפ֔וּל אֶ֖לֶף כִּכַּר־כָּ֑סֶף לִהְי֤וֹת יָדָיו֙ אִתּ֔וֹ לְהַחֲזִ֥יק הַמַּמְלָכָ֖ה בְּיָדֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Phul, king of the Assyrians, came into the land, and Manahem gave Phul a thousand talents of silver to aid him and to establish him in the kingdom.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Phul Assyrian kuningas tuli maakuntaan, ja Menahem antoi Phulille tuhannen leiviskää hopiaa, että hän olis pitänyt hänen kanssansa ja vahvistanut häntä valtakuntaan.
verses.king_james: And Pul the king of Assyria came against the land: and Menahem gave Pul a thousand talents of silver, that his hand might be with him to confirm the kingdom in his hand.

verses.latin_vulgate: Indixitque Manahem argentum super Israël cunctis potentibus et divitibus, ut daret regi Assyriorum quinquaginta siclos argenti per singulos : reversusque est rex Assyriorum, et non est moratus in terra.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּצֵא֩ מְנַחֵ֨ם אֶת־הַכֶּ֜סֶף עַל־יִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל עַ֚ל כׇּל־גִּבּוֹרֵ֣י הַחַ֔יִל לָתֵת֙ לְמֶ֣לֶךְ אַשּׁ֔וּר חֲמִשִּׁ֧ים שְׁקָלִ֛ים כֶּ֖סֶף לְאִ֣ישׁ אֶחָ֑ד וַיָּ֙שׇׁב֙ מֶ֣לֶךְ אַשּׁ֔וּר וְלֹא־עָ֥מַד שָׁ֖ם בָּאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Manahem laid a tax upon Israel, on all that were mighty and rich, to give the king of the Assyrians, each man fifty sicles of silver: so the king of the Assyrians turned back, and did not stay in the land.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Menahem pani hopiaveron voimallisten päälle Israelissa, että itsekukin heistä antais viisikymmentä hopiasikliä Assyrian kuninkaalle. Niin meni Assyrian kuningas kotia jälleen ja ei jäänyt maalle.
verses.king_james: And Menahem exacted the money of Israel, even of all the mighty men of wealth, of each man fifty shekels of silver, to give to the king of Assyria. So the king of Assyria turned back, and stayed not there in the land.

verses.latin_vulgate: Reliqua autem sermonum Manahem, et universa quæ fecit, nonne hæc scripta sunt in libro sermonum dierum regum Israël ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיֶ֛תֶר דִּבְרֵ֥י מְנַחֵ֖ם וְכׇל־אֲשֶׁ֣ר עָשָׂ֑ה הֲלוֹא־הֵ֣ם כְּתוּבִ֗ים עַל־סֵ֛פֶר דִּבְרֵ֥י הַיָּמִ֖ים לְמַלְכֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the rest of the acts of Manahem, and all that he did, are they not written in the book of the words of the days of the kings of Israel?
verses.finnish_biblia: Mitä enempi Menahemista sanomista on, ja kaikista mitä hän tehnyt on: eikö se ole kirjoitettu Israelin kuningasten aikakirjassa?
verses.king_james: And the rest of the acts of Menahem, and all that he did, are they not written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Israel?

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dormivit Manahem cum patribus suis : regnavitque Phaceia filius ejus pro eo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁכַּ֥ב מְנַחֵ֖ם עִם־אֲבֹתָ֑יו וַיִּמְלֹ֛ךְ פְּקַחְיָ֥ה בְנ֖וֹ תַּחְתָּֽיו׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And Manahem slept with his fathers: and Phaceia, his son, reigned in his stead.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Menahem nukkui isäinsä kanssa; ja Pekahja hänen poikansa tuli kuninkaaksi hänen siaansa.
verses.king_james: And Menahem slept with his fathers; and Pekahiah his son reigned in his stead.

verses.latin_vulgate: Anno quinquagesimo Azariæ regis Juda, regnavit Phaceia filius Manahem super Israël in Samaria biennio.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בִּשְׁנַת֙ חֲמִשִּׁ֣ים שָׁנָ֔ה לַעֲזַרְיָ֖ה מֶ֣לֶךְ יְהוּדָ֑ה מָ֠לַ֠ךְ פְּקַֽחְיָ֨ה בֶן־מְנַחֵ֧ם עַל־יִשְׂרָאֵ֛ל בְּשֹׁמְר֖וֹן שְׁנָתָֽיִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: In the fiftieth year of Azarias, king of Juda, reigned Phaceia, the son of Manahem, over Israel, in Samaria, two years.
verses.finnish_biblia: Viidentenäkymmenentenä Asarian Juudan kuninkaan vuonna tuli Pekahja Menahemin poika Israelin kuninkaaksi ja oli kaksi vuotta Samariassa,
verses.king_james: In the fiftieth year of Azariah king of Judah Pekahiah the son of Menahem began to reign over Israel in Samaria, and reigned two years.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et fecit quod erat malum coram Domino : non recessit a peccatis Jeroboam filii Nabat, qui peccare fecit Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֥עַשׂ הָרַ֖ע בְּעֵינֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֑ה לֹ֣א סָ֗ר מֵֽחַטֹּאות֙ יָרׇבְעָ֣ם בֶּן־נְבָ֔ט אֲשֶׁ֥ר הֶחֱטִ֖יא אֶת־יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he did that which was evil before the Lord: he departed not from the sins of Jeroboam, the son of Nabat, who made Israel to sin.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja teki pahaa Herran edessä; ei hän luopunut Jerobeamin Nebatin pojan synneistä, joka Israelin saatti syntiä tekemään.
verses.king_james: And he did that which was evil in the sight of the Lord: he departed not from the sins of Jeroboam the son of Nebat, who made Israel to sin.

verses.latin_vulgate: Conjuravit autem adversus eum Phacee filius Romeliæ, dux ejus, et percussit eum in Samaria in turre domus regiæ, juxta Argob et juxta Arie, et cum eo quinquaginta viros de filiis Galaaditarum : et interfecit eum, regnavitque pro eo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקְשֹׁ֣ר עָלָיו֩ פֶּ֨קַח בֶּן־רְמַלְיָ֜הוּ שָׁלִישׁ֗וֹ וַיַּכֵּ֨הוּ בְשֹׁמְר֜וֹן בְּאַרְמ֤וֹן בֵּית־[הַמֶּ֙לֶךְ֙] (מלך) אֶת־אַרְגֹּ֣ב וְאֶת־הָאַרְיֵ֔ה וְעִמּ֛וֹ חֲמִשִּׁ֥ים אִ֖ישׁ מִבְּנֵ֣י גִלְעָדִ֑ים וַיְמִתֵ֖הוּ וַיִּמְלֹ֥ךְ תַּחְתָּֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Phacee the son of Romelia, his captain, conspired against him, and smote him in Samaria, in the tower of the king's house, near Argob, and near Arie, and with him fifty men of the sons of the Galaadites, and he slew him, and reigned in his stead.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Peka Remaljan poika hänen päämiehensä, kapinoitsi häntä vastaan ja löi hänen kuoliaaksi kuninkaan huoneen salissa, Samariassa, Argobin ja Arjen kanssa, ja viisikymmentä miestä hänen kanssansa Gileadin lapsista. Ja kuin hän oli hänen tappanut, tuli hän kuninkaaksi hänen siaansa.
verses.king_james: But Pekah the son of Remaliah, a captain of his, conspired against him, and smote him in Samaria, in the palace of the king’s house, with Argob and Arieh, and with him fifty men of the Gileadites: and he killed him, and reigned in his room.

verses.latin_vulgate: Reliqua autem sermonum Phaceia, et universa quæ fecit, nonne hæc scripta sunt in libro sermonum dierum regum Israël ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיֶ֛תֶר דִּבְרֵ֥י פְקַחְיָ֖ה וְכׇל־אֲשֶׁ֣ר עָשָׂ֑ה הִנָּ֣ם כְּתוּבִ֗ים עַל־סֵ֛פֶר דִּבְרֵ֥י הַיָּמִ֖ים לְמַלְכֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And the rest of the acts of Phaceia, and all that he did, are they not written in the book of the words of the days of the kings of Israel?
verses.finnish_biblia: Mitä enempi Pekahjasta sanomista on ja kaikista mitä hän tehnyt on: katso, se on kirjoitettu Israelin kuningasten aikakirjassa.
verses.king_james: And the rest of the acts of Pekahiah, and all that he did, behold, they are written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Anno quinquagesimo secundo Azariæ regis Juda, regnavit Phacee filius Romeliæ super Israël in Samaria viginti annis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בִּשְׁנַ֨ת חֲמִשִּׁ֤ים וּשְׁתַּ֙יִם֙ שָׁנָ֔ה לַעֲזַרְיָ֖ה מֶ֣לֶךְ יְהוּדָ֑ה מָ֠לַ֠ךְ פֶּ֣קַח בֶּן־רְמַלְיָ֧הוּ עַל־יִשְׂרָאֵ֛ל בְּשֹׁמְר֖וֹן עֶשְׂרִ֥ים שָׁנָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: In the two and fiftieth year of Azarias, king of Juda, reigned Phacee, the son of Romelia, over Israel, in Samaria, twenty years.
verses.finnish_biblia: Asarjan Juudan kuninkaan toisena vuonna kuudettakymmentä tuli Peka Remaljan poika Israelin kuninkaaksi, ja hallitsi Samariassa kaksikymmentä vuotta,
verses.king_james: In the two and fiftieth year of Azariah king of Judah Pekah the son of Remaliah began to reign over Israel in Samaria, and reigned twenty years.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et fecit quod erat malum coram Domino : non recessit a peccatis Jeroboam filii Nabat, qui peccare fecit Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֥עַשׂ הָרַ֖ע בְּעֵינֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֑ה לֹ֣א סָ֗ר מִן־חַטֹּאות֙ יָרׇבְעָ֣ם בֶּן־נְבָ֔ט אֲשֶׁ֥ר הֶחֱטִ֖יא אֶת־יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he did that which was evil before the Lord: he departed not from the sins of Jeroboam, the son of Nabat, who made Israel to sin.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja teki pahaa Herran edessä, ei hän luopunut Jerobeamin Nebatin pojan synneistä, joka saatti Israelin syntiä tekemään.
verses.king_james: And he did that which was evil in the sight of the Lord: he departed not from the sins of Jeroboam the son of Nebat, who made Israel to sin.

verses.latin_vulgate: In diebus Phacee regis Israël, venit Theglathphalasar rex Assur, et cepit Ajon, et Abel Domum, Maacha et Janoë, et Cedes, et Asor, et Galaad, et Galilæam, et universam terram Nephthali : et transtulit eos in Assyrios.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בִּימֵ֞י פֶּ֣קַח מֶֽלֶךְ־יִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל בָּא֮ תִּגְלַ֣ת פִּלְאֶ֘סֶר֮ מֶ֣לֶךְ אַשּׁוּר֒ וַיִּקַּ֣ח אֶת־עִיּ֡וֹן וְאֶת־אָבֵ֣ל בֵּֽית־מַעֲכָ֡ה וְאֶת־יָ֠נ֠וֹחַ וְאֶת־קֶ֨דֶשׁ וְאֶת־חָצ֤וֹר וְאֶת־הַגִּלְעָד֙ וְאֶת־הַגָּלִ֔ילָה כֹּ֖ל אֶ֣רֶץ נַפְתָּלִ֑י וַיַּגְלֵ֖ם אַשּֽׁוּרָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: In the days of Phacee, king of Israel, came Theglathphalasar, king of Assyria, and took Aion, and Abel Domum Maacha, and Janoe, and Cedes, and Asor, and Galaad, and Galilee, and all the land of Nephthali: and carried them captives into Assyria.
verses.finnish_biblia: Pekan Israelin kuninkaan aikana tuli Tiglat Pilesser Assyrian kuningas, ja otti Gijonin, Abelbetmaekan, Janoan, Kedeksen, Hasorin, Gileadin, Galilean ja kaiken Naphtalin maan, ja vei heidät Assyriaan.
verses.king_james: In the days of Pekah king of Israel came Tiglath–pileser king of Assyria, and took Ijon, and Abel–beth–maachah, and Janoah, and Kedesh, and Hazor, and Gilead, and Galilee, all the land of Naphtali, and carried them captive to Assyria.

verses.latin_vulgate: Conjuravit autem et tetendit insidias Osee filius Ela contra Phacee filium Romeliæ, et percussit eum, et interfecit : regnavitque pro eo vigesimo anno Joatham filii Oziæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקְשׇׁר־קֶ֜שֶׁר הוֹשֵׁ֣עַ בֶּן־אֵלָ֗ה עַל־פֶּ֙קַח֙ בֶּן־רְמַלְיָ֔הוּ וַיַּכֵּ֙הוּ֙ וַיְמִיתֵ֔הוּ וַיִּמְלֹ֖ךְ תַּחְתָּ֑יו בִּשְׁנַ֣ת עֶשְׂרִ֔ים לְיוֹתָ֖ם בֶּן־עֻזִּיָּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Now Osee, son of Ela, conspired, and formed a plot against Phacee, the son of Romelia, and struck him, and slew him: and reigned in his stead in the twentieth year of Joatham, the son of Ozias.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Hosea Elan poika nosti kapinan Pekaa Remaljan poikaa vastaan ja löi hänen kuoliaaksi, ja tuli kuninkaaksi hänen siaansa kahdentenakymmenentenä Jotamin Ussian pojan vuonna.
verses.king_james: And Hoshea the son of Elah made a conspiracy against Pekah the son of Remaliah, and smote him, and slew him, and reigned in his stead, in the twentieth year of Jotham the son of Uzziah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Reliqua autem sermonum Phacee, et universa quæ fecit, nonne hæc scripta sunt in libro sermonum dierum regum Israël ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיֶ֥תֶר דִּבְרֵי־פֶ֖קַח וְכׇל־אֲשֶׁ֣ר עָשָׂ֑ה הִנָּ֣ם כְּתוּבִ֗ים עַל־סֵ֛פֶר דִּבְרֵ֥י הַיָּמִ֖ים לְמַלְכֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: But the rest of the acts of Phacee, and all that he did, are they not written in the book of the words of the days of the kings of Israel?
verses.finnish_biblia: Mitä enempi Pekasta sanomista on, ja kaikista mitä hän tehnyt on: katso, se on kirjoitettu Israelin kuningasten aikakirjassa.
verses.king_james: And the rest of the acts of Pekah, and all that he did, behold, they are written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Anno secundo Phacee filii Romeliæ regis Israël, regnavit Joatham filius Oziæ regis Juda.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בִּשְׁנַ֣ת שְׁתַּ֔יִם לְפֶ֥קַח בֶּן־רְמַלְיָ֖הוּ מֶ֣לֶךְ יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל מָלַ֛ךְ יוֹתָ֥ם בֶּן־עֻזִּיָּ֖הוּ מֶ֥לֶךְ יְהוּדָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: In the second year of Phacee, the son of Romelia king of Israel, reigned Joatham, son of Ozias, king of Juda.
verses.finnish_biblia: Toisena Pekan Remaljan pojan Israelin kuninkaan vuonna tuli Jotam, Ussian Juudan kuninkaan poika, kuninkaaksi.
verses.king_james: In the second year of Pekah the son of Remaliah king of Israel began Jotham the son of Uzziah king of Judah to reign.

verses.latin_vulgate: Viginti quinque annorum erat cum regnare cœpisset, et sedecim annis regnavit in Jerusalem : nomen matris ejus Jerusa filia Sadoc.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֶּן־עֶשְׂרִ֨ים וְחָמֵ֤שׁ שָׁנָה֙ הָיָ֣ה בְמׇלְכ֔וֹ וְשֵׁשׁ־עֶשְׂרֵ֣ה שָׁנָ֔ה מָלַ֖ךְ בִּירוּשָׁלָ֑͏ִם וְשֵׁ֣ם אִמּ֔וֹ יְרוּשָׁ֖א בַּת־צָדֽוֹק׃
verses.douay_rheims: He was five and twenty years old when he began to reign, and he reigned sixteen years in Jerusalem: the name of his mother was Jerusa, the daughter of Sadoc.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja viiden ajastaikainen kolmattakymmentä oli hän tullessansa kuninkaaksi, ja hallitsi kuusitoistakymmentä ajastaikaa Jerusalemissa; hänen äitinsä nimi oli Jerusa Zadokin tytär.
verses.king_james: Five and twenty years old was he when he began to reign, and he reigned sixteen years in Jerusalem. And his mother’s name was Jerusha, the daughter of Zadok.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fecitque quod erat placitum coram Domino : juxta omnia quæ fecerat Ozias pater suus, operatus est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֥עַשׂ הַיָּשָׁ֖ר בְּעֵינֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֑ה כְּכֹ֧ל אֲשֶׁר־עָשָׂ֛ה עֻזִּיָּ֥הוּ אָבִ֖יו עָשָֽׂה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he did that which was right before the Lord: according to all that his father Ozias had done, so did he.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän teki mitä Herralle hyvästi kelpasi, kaiken sen jälkeen, kuin hänen isänsä Ussia tehnyt oli,
verses.king_james: And he did that which was right in the sight of the Lord: he did according to all that his father Uzziah had done.

verses.latin_vulgate: Verumtamen excelsa non abstulit : adhuc populus immolabat, et adolebat incensum in excelsis. Ipse ædificavit portam domus Domini sublimissimam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רַ֤ק הַבָּמוֹת֙ לֹ֣א סָ֔רוּ ע֗וֹד הָעָ֛ם מְזַבְּחִ֥ים וּֽמְקַטְּרִ֖ים בַּבָּמ֑וֹת ה֗וּא בָּנָ֛ה אֶת־שַׁ֥עַר בֵּית־יְהֹוָ֖ה הָעֶלְיֽוֹן׃
verses.douay_rheims: But the high places he took not away: the people still sacrificed, and burnt incense in the high places: he built the highest gate of the house of the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Paitsi ettei he luopuneet korkeuksista; sillä kansa uhrasi ja suitsutti vielä korkeuksilla; hän rakensi Herran huoneen ylimmäisen portin.
verses.king_james: Howbeit the high places were not removed: the people sacrificed and burned incense still in the high places. He built the higher gate of the house of the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Reliqua autem sermonum Joatham, et universa quæ fecit, nonne hæc scripta sunt in libro verborum dierum regum Juda ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיֶ֛תֶר דִּבְרֵ֥י יוֹתָ֖ם אֲשֶׁ֣ר עָשָׂ֑ה הֲלֹא־הֵ֣ם כְּתוּבִ֗ים עַל־סֵ֛פֶר דִּבְרֵ֥י הַיָּמִ֖ים לְמַלְכֵ֥י יְהוּדָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: But the rest of the acts of Joatham, and all that he did, are they not written in the book of the words of the days of the kings of Juda?
verses.finnish_biblia: Mitä enempi Jotamista sanomista on, ja kaikista mitä hän tehnyt on: eikö se ole kirjoitettu Juudan kuningasten aikakirjassa?
verses.king_james: Now the rest of the acts of Jotham, and all that he did, are they not written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Judah?

verses.latin_vulgate: In diebus illis cœpit Dominus mittere in Judam Rasin regem Syriæ, et Phacee filium Romeliæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בַּיָּמִ֣ים הָהֵ֔ם הֵחֵ֣ל יְהֹוָ֗ה לְהַשְׁלִ֙יחַ֙ בִּֽיהוּדָ֔ה רְצִ֖ין מֶ֣לֶךְ אֲרָ֑ם וְאֵ֖ת פֶּ֥קַח בֶּן־רְמַלְיָֽהוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: In those days the Lord began to send into Juda, Rasin king of Syria, and Phacee the son of Romelia.
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin rupesi Herra lähettämään Juudalle Retsinin Syyrian kuninkaan ja Pekan Remaljan pojan.
verses.king_james: In those days the Lord began to send against Judah Rezin the king of Syria, and Pekah the son of Remaliah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dormivit Joatham cum patribus suis, sepultusque est cum eis in civitate David patris sui : et regnavit Achaz filius ejus pro eo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁכַּ֤ב יוֹתָם֙ עִם־אֲבֹתָ֔יו וַיִּקָּבֵר֙ עִם־אֲבֹתָ֔יו בְּעִ֖יר דָּוִ֣ד אָבִ֑יו וַיִּמְלֹ֛ךְ אָחָ֥ז בְּנ֖וֹ תַּחְתָּֽיו׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And Joatham slept with his fathers, and was buried with them in the city of David, his father; and Achaz, his son, reigned in his stead.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Jotam nukkui isäinsä kanssa ja haudattiin isäinsä tykö, isänsä Davidin kaupunkiin; ja Ahas hänen poikansa tuli kuninkaaksi hänen siaansa.
verses.king_james: And Jotham slept with his fathers, and was buried with his fathers in the city of David his father: and Ahaz his son reigned in his stead.
